description:
Introducing Mast Quay; a newly built collection of one, two and three bedroom apartments across two striking towers in the Royal Borough of Greenwich.

All apartments have been set to a high standard with quality fixtures and fittings. These contemporary homes provide spacious open-plan living with modern interior and wooden flooring throughout.  All residents benefit from the ease of having a washer, a dishwasher, an oven and a fridge-freezer built in, with large balconies offering far-reaching river and city views. The development offers communal garden, an on-site gym, concierge and secure car park.

Residents benefit from the Elizabeth Line, which is now operating, cutting journey times as well as boosting capacity and improving connections.  

*The photos & floorplans show the layout & finish of a flat in the development. Sizes/prices/layouts/finishes of each flat vary. To check broadband and mobile phone coverage please visit Ofcom here ofcom.org.uk/phones-telecoms-and-internet/advice-for-consumers/advice/ofcom-checker

agency: Hamptons, Build to Rent Estate Agent Logo

address: Mizzen Mast House, Mast Quay, Woolwich, Greenwich
description:
This second-floor apartment features a contemporary open-plan kitchen, fully fitted with integrated appliances including a washing machine, dishwasher, and fridge-freezer. The spacious reception room is tastefully furnished with a sofa, coffee table, and dining set, and opens out onto a private balcony, perfect for relaxing or entertaining.
There are two generously sized double bedrooms, one of which benefits from an en-suite shower room. Both bedrooms come furnished with double beds and storage. A modern family bathroom with a shower-over-bath completes the layout.
The property also includes one allocated parking bay, two lifts within the building, a 24-hour on-site concierge service, and access to communal roof terraces with stunning views across London. 
This fantastic property is expected to go quickly, so early viewing is highly recommended. Please email us to arrange your viewing.

description:
Available to move into in August is this two bedroom, two bathroom second floor apartment is offered furnished and is located on the sought after Galleons Lock development within convenient walking distance of Gallions Reach DLR. Internally the property boasts a spacious living area with french doors leading to a balcony with views over the dock, separate kitchen, two double bedrooms with an en-suite shower room to the master and further bathroom suite. Other benefits include free residents permit parking and 24 hour porter/security. 

Spencer James Residential is an independent estate agency established in 2002 specialising in all aspects of residential lettings, sales and property management.

We are serious about the pivotal role we play between our landlords and tenants; buyers and sellers. Our clients are assured in the knowledge that we work under an approved code of practice, due to our memberships with recognised industry bodies including: the Association of Residential Lettings Agents (ARLA); the National Association of Estate Agents (NAEA); and the Property Ombudsman (Sales and Lettings).

Laminate wood effect flooring, double glazed windows and french doors leading to balcony. Storage Heater.
Kitchen
Fitted with a range of eye and base level units incorporating a stainless steel sink and mixer tap, washing machine, fridge freezer, cooker and hob. Double glazed window to rear aspect.

En-Suite

Three piece suite comprising a panelled bath, low level wc and hand wash basin. Tiled Flooring.

title: Apartment
agency: Spencer James Residential, London Estate Agent Logo

description:
John Payne are delighted to bring to the market this top floor, two bedroom apartment located in the highly sought after Love Lane development in the heart of Woolwich. The property is ideally located as a corner suite, right in the centre of the development, meaning it benefits from quiet surroundings whilst still enjoying a town centre location.

The property is unique in the development, with the largest living space for a two bed, at 29ft long. It benefits from added storage in the open plan kitchen reception room, double aspect windows creating all day light, wood laminate flooring and door to balcony. The kitchen is fitted with a range of modern wall and base units with complimentary work surfaces and integrated appliances. There are two double bedrooms, the master with built in storage and access onto the balcony. The second double bedroom has carpet as fitted and access to the balcony also. Off of the spacious entrance hall, also with storage, you will find a modern bathroom fitted with a white three piece suite, comprising a tiled sided bath cistern, enclosed WC and wash hand basin. 

Externally there is a 31ft balcony covering the width of the apartment overlooking Woolwich Town Centre.

Further benefits include 24 hour security/ concierge service. 

Just few minutes’ walk to Woolwich Arsenal Station for Thameslink, Southeastern lines and DLR as well as the luxury river boat and easy access to Woolwich ferry. The Elizabeth line/Crossrail is just a short stroll away for direct access into Canary Wharf (7 mins), Liverpool Street (14 mis) and Bond Street (21 mins).

The vibrant high street is on your door step with a Tesco superstore and 24 hour gym beneath your apartment and various local shopping facilities including traditional market stalls, eateries, coffee shops and high street shops. You will also benefit from the Royal Arsenal Riverside restaurants, bars and fortnightly farmers markets.

Local Authority Greenwich Council Tax Band D
Energy Efficiency Rating C

Deposit payable is £2,365. A Holding Deposit of £473.08, or this property is available with our No Deposit Option, this is based on the advertised rent, this will be required to reserve this property. 

Floorplan measurements pending verification

Broadband and Mobile Phone: Ofcom suggest that Ultrafast broadband is available to this property and 5g Mobile signal may be available on some networks. Information regarding broadband options and phone signal can be obtained from the Ofcom broadband and mobile coverage checker. To check broadband and mobile phone coverage please visit Ofcom here ofcom.org.uk/phones-telecoms-and-internet/advice-for-consumers/advice/ofcom-checker
title: Flat
agency: John Payne, Woolwich Estate Agent Logo

address: Building 50, Argyll Road, Royal Arsenal SE18
description:
Highly sought after, river fronting two bed, in a popular block, within this established landmark development, situated east of Greenwich and only a short walk from the Elizabeth Line. Situated on the 2nd floor, the apartment benefits from windows running the full width of the main reception, together with a spacious balcony, providing a sweeping view of the river. Generous semi open plan kitchen with a range of integrated appliances & granite work surface, high quality oak laminate flooring and two double bedrooms (master with en suite).

Area

The Royal Arsenal is a former munitions factory & storage facility with a history dating back to 1671, that is being tastefully transformed to provide a blend of converted & new build residential properties, together with a central open space, bars, restaurants and an hotel.

Beautifully landscaped, the builder has taken great care to create a development that is a pleasure to live in, rather than yet another sterile 'stack of boxes'. It retains a real sense of community yet retains a high degree of peace and tranquility, away from the 'big smoke'.

The development currently offers

* 24 Concierge & Security
* Choice of four on site gyms including PureGym
* Two Youngs "gastro pubs" The Dial Arch & The Guardhouse
* Two theatres - Woolwich Works & Punchdrunk
* Salt - Craft Beer & Pizzeria
* Gourmet Sushi
* Jinshi Sichuan-Cantonese fusion restaurant
* Five on site cafés
* Health Centre
* Chemist
* Dentist
* Tesco Express
* M&S Food Hall
* Sainsburys
* Dry Cleaning service
* Zipcar Car Sharing Club
* Fortnightly Farmers Market

Situated east of Greenwich, adjacent to Woolwich Town Centre (offering an array of main street shopping and a vibrant street market) the development is easily reached by road & rail.

The Elizabeth Line station is no more than a short stroll away, which offers a direct route to Canary Wharf in as little as 8 minutes, Liverpool Street in less than 15 minutes and London Bridge / Cannon Street) in approx. 25 minutes, via the Main Line.

London City Airport can also be reached in as little as 5 minutes via the DLR, with Stratford also accessible in approx. 20 minutes.

As far as nearby leisure is concerned, a short cab ride will take you to nearby Blackheath, Greenwich or, the O2 - where you will be spoilt for choice in terms of food, drink and nightlife.

As an alternative to the train or car, the Thames Clipper river bus service also docks immediately adjacent to the development and provides additional links with The O2, Greenwich, Canary Wharf, Tower Bridge, Blackfriars, The Southbank (Tate Modern) and beyond.

title: Apartment
agency: Spencer James Residential, London Estate Agent Logo

description:
Tenants Costs: (please note that the below fees are per tenancy and not per tenant)

To reserve/secure this property we will require one weeks' rent holding deposit (£415.38). Once referencing applications for all tenants have passed we will request final move in monies which include one months' rent (£1,800.00) and 5 weeks deposit (£2,076.92) with the deduction of the reservation fee(holding deposit) totaling £3,461.54.


Tenancy information
Holding Deposit (per tenancy)
One Weeks Rent. This is to reserve a property. Please Note: This will be withheld if any relevant person (Including any guarantor (s)). withdraw from the tenancy, fail a right-to-rent check, provide materially significant false or misleading information or fail to sign their tenancy agreement (and/ or deed of guarantee) within 15 calendar days (or other deadline for agreement as mutually agreed in writing). The holding fee will be returned to you on the day of move in.

Security Deposit (per tenancy)
Five weeks rent. This covers damages or defaults on the part of the tenant during the tenancy, This will be registered with the TDS. This must be paid along with the first month's rent before we can release the keys to your new home.

Unpaid Rent
Interest at 3% above the Bank of England Base Rate from Rent Due Date until paid in order to pursue non-payment of rent. Please Note: This will not be levied until the rent is more than 14 days in arrears.

Lost Key(s) or other Security Device(s)
Tenants are liable to the actual cost of replacing any lost key(s) or other security device(s). If the loss results in locks needing to be changed, the actual costs of a locksmith, new lock and replacement keys for the tenant, landlord any other persons requiring keys will be charged to the tenant.

Change of Sharer / tenant (Tenants Request)
£50 (inc. VAT) per replacement tenant or any reasonable costs incurred if higher. To cover the costs associated with taking landlords instructions, new tenant referencing and Right-to-Rent checks, deposit registration as well as the preparation and execution of new legal documents.

Early Termination (Tenants Request)
Should the tenant wish to leave their contract early, they shall be liable to the landlords costs in re-letting the property as well as all rent due under the tenancy until the start date of the replacement tenancy. These costs will be no more than the maximum amount of rent outstanding on the tenancy.

Our deposits are registered with The Tenancy deposit scheme (TDS) - Membership number G02099 (Contact them on -  )
Our clients money protection is though property mark - Membership number C0008762
Our independent redress scheme is The Property Ombudsman (TPO) - Membership number N01532

PLEASE CALL AND ASK A MEMBER OF OUR STAFF IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS ABOUT OUR FEES
Please note that lettings agents are required by law to publish on their websites information for potential tenants about relevant fees, redress schemes and client money protection schemes (including the names of those schemes). Relevant fees must also be published on third party websites, such as Rightmove. For properties to rent in England and Wales, details of the agent's membership of any redress scheme and client money protection scheme must also be published with their fees on Rightmove. It is the agent's responsibility to ensure that all relevant information is provided to Rightmove and is up to date and accurate. If the relevant information does not appear here, the agent may have included it within the property description.

The property comprises entrance hallway, spacious living/dining room with patio doors leading to outside space, kitchen with appliances, three-piece family bathroom and two double bedrooms with the master bedroom benefitting from an en-suite shower room.

The property has secure underground parking as well as secure entry phone system to the building.

address: Building 22, Cadogan Road, Royal Arsenal SE18
description:
Quirky, loft style apartment, in a popular period conversion in the heart of this established landmark development, situated adjacent to the river, east of Greenwich and only a short stroll from the Elizabeth Line. Spacious reception, with extended height west facing windows, double height ceiling, semi open plan kitchen with range of appliances and two double bedrooms (master with en suite).

Area

The Royal Arsenal is a former munitions factory & storage facility with a history dating back to 1671, that is being tastefully transformed to provide a blend of converted & new build residential properties, together with a central open space, bars, restaurants and an hotel.

Beautifully landscaped, the builder has taken great care to create a development that is a pleasure to live in, rather than yet another sterile 'stack of boxes'. It retains a real sense of community yet retains a high degree of peace and tranquility, away from the 'big smoke'.

The development currently offers

* 24 Concierge & Security
* Choice of four on site gyms including PureGym
* Two Youngs "gastro pubs" The Dial Arch & The Guardhouse
* Two theatres - Woolwich Works & Punchdrunk
* Salt - Craft Beer & Pizzeria
* Gourmet Sushi
* Jinshi Sichuan-Cantonese fusion restaurant
* Five on site cafés
* Health Centre
* Chemist
* Dentist
* Tesco Express
* M&S Food Hall
* Sainsburys
* Dry Cleaning service
* Zipcar Car Sharing Club
* Fortnightly Farmers Market

Situated east of Greenwich, adjacent to Woolwich Town Centre (offering an array of main street shopping and a vibrant street market) the development is easily reached by road & rail.

The Elizabeth Line station is no more than a short stroll away, which offers a direct route to Canary Wharf in as little as 8 minutes, Liverpool Street in less than 15 minutes and London Bridge / Cannon Street) in approx. 25 minutes, via the Main Line.

London City Airport can also be reached in as little as 5 minutes via the DLR, with Stratford also accessible in approx. 20 minutes.

As far as nearby leisure is concerned, a short cab ride will take you to nearby Blackheath, Greenwich or, the O2 - where you will be spoilt for choice in terms of food, drink and nightlife.

As an alternative to the train or car, the Thames Clipper river bus service also docks immediately adjacent to the development and provides additional links with The O2, Greenwich, Canary Wharf, Tower Bridge, Blackfriars, The Southbank (Tate Modern) and beyond.
